issues.description: PlayFromHand is incorrect; cards are being played from trash, not hand. Should be a custom action or PlayFromTrash equivalent.
Filter missing source specification. Must indicate cards are chosen from trash, not deck/hand.
Second action should specify that one card plays normally and the other plays rested. Current DSL does not capture the rested state differentiation.

DSL lacks mechanism to express 'up to 1' selection and the conditional resting of the second card. Standard DSL cannot represent 'play 1 card and play the other card rested' logic without additional state/conditional actions.
